case_title: CAROLINE CANNIZZARO VS. MIGUEL MARTINEZ et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANNIZZARO, CAROLINE AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, MIGUEL DOES 1 TO 30 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-15-2014 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-15-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-22-2014

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-25-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-15-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-25-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
